notableMoments: 2026 World Cup will be Albania's first-ever World Cup appearance
Qualified for Euro 2016 in France, their first major tournament, reaching the group stage
Narrowly missed qualifying for Euro 2024 despite a strong campaign
Albanian football legend Lorik Cana captained the team at Euro 2016
Football is the most popular sport in Albania, with the national team known as 'Kuq e Zi' (Red and Black)
Historic qualification for 2026 represents the crowning achievement of Albanian football
